description: Cloud Application Development – HTWG Konstanz | Milestone 2

people.description: End user. Plans, manages and shares trips. Receives travel alerts and personalized feed.
people.name: Traveler

people.description: B2B partner. Manages destination services and accesses aggregated traveler marketing data.
people.name: Destination Manager

containers.description: Email/password and Google OAuth. Issues signed JWT tokens.
containers.name: Firebase Auth

softwareSystems.description: Official government travel warning feeds (e.g. Auswärtiges Amt, FCDO).
softwareSystems.name: Travel Warnings API

containers.description: Single entry point for all clients. Validates Firebase JWT, enforces SaaS plan rate limits, routes to downstream services.
containers.name: API Gateway

components.description: Create, list, view and edit trips (/trips, /trips/[id]).
components.name: Trip Pages

components.description: Itinerary builder with travel info overlay (/plan, /plan-view).
components.name: Plan Pages

components.description: Displays active travel warnings and weather alerts for user's trips.
components.name: Alert Banner

containers.description: Nuxt 3 single-page application. All API traffic routed through the API Gateway.
containers.name: Frontend SPA

relationships.description: All API calls with Bearer token

components.description: Read/write user rows in User DB.
components.name: User Repository

components.description: Shared Firebase Admin SDK middleware – verifies JWT on every request.
components.name: Auth Verifier

containers.description: Manages user accounts and profiles. Upserts users on first Firebase login.
containers.name: User Service

components.description: Publishes TripCreated / TripUpdated events to Pub/Sub after writes.
components.name: Event Publisher

containers.description: Core trip management: trips, plan locations, travel plans, reviews and likes.
containers.name: Trip Service

components.description: GET /b2b/destinations/:id/travelers – aggregated marketing data for partners.
components.name: B2B Controller

components.description: Reads destination data from Destination DB.
components.name: Destination Repository

containers.description: Manages destinations, routes, transport and accommodation options. Provides B2B data access for destination partners.
containers.name: Destination Service

components.description: Subscribes to TripCreated/Updated events. Scores relevance per follower.
components.name: Feed Consumer

components.description: Assembles and stores personalized feed entries in Social DB.
components.name: Feed Builder

components.description: GET /feed – returns pre-computed feed for authenticated user.
components.name: Feed API

components.description: Scheduled CronJob: aggregates weekly highlights, publishes NewsletterReady event.
components.name: Newsletter Job

containers.description: Builds personalized live feeds and newsletters by consuming trip events asynchronously. Handles large datasets via background workers.
containers.name: Social Service

components.description: CronJob: fetches official travel warnings from external API.
components.name: Warning Poller

components.description: CronJob: fetches weather forecasts for all destination cities.
components.name: Weather Poller

components.description: Compares new warning/weather data with active travel plans. Identifies affected users.
components.name: Diff Engine

containers.description: Scheduled service: polls travel warnings and weather data, diffs against active trip plans, notifies affected travelers.
containers.name: Travel Info Service

relationships.description: GET active travel plans for diff

containers.description: Consumes events from Pub/Sub and delivers email and push notifications to travelers.
containers.name: Notification Service

containers.description: Feed entries, follow graph, newsletter log.
containers.name: Social DB

containers.description: Cached warnings, weather snapshots, alert log.
containers.name: Travel Info DB

containers.description: Pub/Sub topics: TripCreated, TripUpdated, TravelAlert, NewsletterReady.
containers.name: Message Bus

containers.description: Kubernetes cluster. All services deployed as Deployments with HPA. CronJobs for scheduled workers. Provisioned via Terraform.
containers.name: GKE Cluster

containers.description: Stores Docker images for all services. Referenced by GKE workloads.
containers.name: Artifact Registry

containers.description: Stores DB connection strings, Firebase config and API keys per service. Mounted as K8s Secrets via ESO.
containers.name: Secret Manager

containers.description: Managed PostgreSQL 16 – one instance per service database. Connected via Cloud SQL Auth Proxy sidecar.
containers.name: Cloud SQL

softwareSystems.description: Microservice SaaS platform. Plans: Free / Standard / Enterprise. Follows 12-Factor principles. Deployed on GKE via Terraform.
softwareSystems.name: TravelManager

name: TravelManager

componentViews.description: Nuxt 3 pages and components running in the browser.
componentViews.name: Component View: TravelManager - Frontend SPA
componentViews.title: Level 3 – Frontend SPA Components

componentViews.description: Profile management and Firebase Auth integration.
componentViews.name: Component View: TravelManager - User Service
componentViews.title: Level 3 – User Service

componentViews.description: Core trip, location, review, likes and travel plan management. Publishes domain events.
componentViews.name: Component View: TravelManager - Trip Service
componentViews.title: Level 3 – Trip Service

componentViews.description: Destination data and B2B partner data access.
componentViews.name: Component View: TravelManager - Destination Service
componentViews.title: Level 3 – Destination Service

componentViews.description: Async worker: personalized live feed and newsletter from Pub/Sub events.
componentViews.name: Component View: TravelManager - Social Service
componentViews.title: Level 3 – Social Service (async)

componentViews.description: Scheduled poller: diffs warnings/weather against trip plans, publishes alerts.
componentViews.name: Component View: TravelManager - Travel Info Service
componentViews.title: Level 3 – Travel Info Service (async)

componentViews.description: Async consumer: delivers email and push notifications.
componentViews.name: Component View: TravelManager - Notification Service
componentViews.title: Level 3 – Notification Service (async)

containerViews.description: Runtime architecture: 6 microservices on GKE, each with its own DB, connected via Pub/Sub. GKE/Terraform infrastructure omitted for clarity.
containerViews.name: Container View: TravelManager
containerViews.title: Level 2 – Containers (Microservices)

containerViews.description: How all services are hosted on GKE. Terraform provisions the cluster, Cloud SQL instances, Artifact Registry and Secret Manager.
containerViews.name: Container View: TravelManager
containerViews.title: Level 2 – Deployment Infrastructure (GKE + Terraform)

systemContextViews.description: TravelManager SaaS: end users, B2B destination managers and external dependencies.

systemContextViews.title: Level 1 – System Context
